message:
feat(fcp-bootstrap): hardware-token verification pack with evidence bundles br-24llg.4.3.2

Add 11 scenario-based verification tests in the verification_pack module,
each producing structured JSON evidence records conforming to the shared
fcp-verification-bundle/v1 schema:

1. Successful onboarding (Ed25519 identity, full pipeline)
2. Wrong PIN refusal (typed error mapping)
3. Missing PIN refusal (workflow integration)
4. Missing slot / token not found
5. Incompatible key type (RSA-only provisioning refusal)
6. CA-only token (no end-entity certificate)
7. Empty token (no certificates at all)
8. Cleanup determinism (explicit close, Drop, close-then-Drop, error path)
9. Workflow-level success (full BootstrapWorkflow pipeline)
10. Multi-key selection preference (Ed25519 > X25519 > RSA)
11. Deterministic rerun (identical material across instantiations)

Each test emits a VerificationRecord with setup/action/assert/negative/
teardown steps, timing, and evidence strings suitable for audit replay.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
